titles.title: What a mighty God we serve – v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What a mighty God we serve, What a mighty God we serve, What a mighty God we serve, What a mighty God we serve.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh let us sing and praise the Lord, Oh let us sing and praise the Lord, Oh let us sing and praise the Lord, Oh let us sing and praise the Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sing Hosanna hallelujah! Sing Hosanna, Sing Hosanna, Sing Hosanna to the King of Kings Sing Hosanna, Sing Hosanna, Sing Hosanna to the King(2)
